name: the IaC convention rule set (22 rules) is ingested and its count carried in the completeness verdict
command: printf '%s' '{"pillars":{}}' > d.json; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --design d.json 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'iac_rules=22' e.txt && echo iac-rules-ingested 1>&2
